equivalence_argument: No mapped implementation was found; the generic port builder still builds the EVM before the pool, while nodebuilder only defines a pool-aware method that the audited builder trait/path does not call.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The audited port does not build the transaction pool before EVM construction or invoke a pool-aware executor builder from the component construction path.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/node/src/executor.rs defines build_evm_with_pool and constructs BlockVerifier from pool.clone(), but the active reth node builder trait in crates/node/builder/src/components/execute.rs exposes only build_evm.
crates/node/builder/src/components/builder.rs calls executor_builder.build_evm(context) before pool_builder.build_pool(...), so pool-aware construction is not wired into the component build order.

notes: Confirmed gap: the concrete builder order contradicts the invariant, even though nodebuilder contains an unused pool-aware construction method.
rationale: The diff changes builder order so pool is built first and passed to build_evm_with_pool, while the new BlockVerifier stores a transaction pool and probes async pool access. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Node building constructs the transaction pool before EVM construction and uses build_evm_with_pool so the EVM/executor setup can create block verification with access to the same transaction pool.
suggested_falsification_tests: Use an ExecutorBuilder implementation that records the pool passed to build_evm_with_pool and assert it is the same pool used by the network and payload builder; then assert BlockVerifier can call get_async_transaction_by_hash on that pool.
summary: Pool-aware EVM construction is defined but not wired into node component build order.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Instantiate RitualNode components and assert the component builder calls a pool-aware executor construction path; current code should fail because build_evm runs before build_pool.
title: Block verifier receives transaction pool
